summary: Shared resend cooldown constant used by auth UIs and hooks.
notes: Use with stable auth form and cooldown behavior.

summary: Builds the default signup callback URL from the configured app base URL.

outputs.description: Absolute callback URL for signup confirmation.

notes: Use for app-owned signup and invitation flows.

summary: Builds the default password reset redirect URL from the configured app base URL.

outputs.description: Absolute callback URL for password reset.

notes: Use for app-owned password reset flows.

summary: Validates email input for shared auth forms.

outputs.description: True when the email matches the shared BrightWeb validation rules.

notes: Use for starter and app-owned auth form validation.

summary: Validates password input against the shared BrightWeb starter rules.

outputs.description: Boolean validity plus the current rule failures.

notes: Use for starter and app-owned auth form validation.

summary: Resolves the configured auth base URL for other shared auth helpers.
notes: Do not build app code directly on this helper in v1.

summary: Normalizes raw role values into the shared BrightWeb role union.
notes: Used internally by server auth and admin helpers.

summary: Determines access to the current Insights CMS surface.

outputs.description: True when the role can access the current Insights CMS surface.

notes: Treat this as internal route policy logic in v1.

summary: Chooses the current post-login landing path from the user's role.
notes: Treat this as internal route policy logic in v1.

summary: Client hook for resend cooldown and timer state in auth flows.
notes: Use for app-owned auth forms and resend flows.

summary: Guards a server page or component and returns the signed-in user context.

outputs.description: Authenticated user context for server components and pages.

notes: Use as the default server entrypoint for authenticated page data.

summary: Guards a server page or component for one or more allowed roles.

outputs.description: Authenticated server context for the allowed role set.

notes: Use for role-gated dashboard pages and layouts.

summary: Returns the current server-side auth and role state without redirecting.

outputs.description: Current auth and role state for the request.

notes: Use when an app needs read-only access to current auth state.

summary: Lower-level user access helper used by the current server auth surface.
notes: Treat as internal composition for the stable server helpers.

summary: Lower-level role access helper used by the current admin handlers.
notes: Treat as internal server composition in v1.

summary: Looks up the profile record for a Supabase user.

outputs.description: Resolved profile id or lookup error.

notes: Treat as internal server composition in v1.

summary: Applies app-owned module registration overrides without mutating the imported registrations.

inputs.name: registrations
inputs.description: Module registrations to clone and customize.

inputs.name: overrides
inputs.description: Override functions keyed by module registration key.

outputs.description: New registration objects with known overrides applied.

notes: Unknown override keys emit a warning that includes the known module keys.

summary: Rewrites a navigation href across a shell module registration without mutating it.

inputs.name: registration
inputs.description: Module registration to clone and rewrite.

inputs.name: fromHref
inputs.description: Existing href to replace in navigation items and toolbar matchers.

outputs.description: New registration with matching href values rewritten.

notes: Rewrites navItems, primaryNav, adminNavItem, toolsItems, moduleGroups, active matchers, and toolbar route matchers.

summary: Tokenized avatar root with small, default, and large sizes.
notes: Compose with the exported avatar image, fallback, badge, and group helpers.

summary: Image primitive for the shared avatar component.
notes: Use inside Avatar.

summary: Fallback content for avatars without a loaded image.
notes: Use inside Avatar.

summary: Size-aware status badge positioned on an avatar.
notes: Use inside Avatar.

summary: Overlapping layout container for a set of avatars.
notes: Supports all shared avatar sizes.

summary: Overflow count indicator for avatar groups.
notes: Place after visible avatars in AvatarGroup.

summary: Controlled tokenized search field with optional inline clear action.
notes: Supports compact and default sizes.

summary: Base tokenized loading placeholder block.
notes: Uses the theme skeleton recipe and reduced-motion behavior.

summary: Single-line text loading placeholder.
notes: Accepts any CSS width.

summary: Tapered stack of text loading placeholders.
notes: The final line is shortened to resemble text.

summary: Card-framed loading placeholder composed from skeleton primitives.
notes: Uses only shared card and skeleton tokens.

summary: Circular loading placeholder for avatars and icon wells.
notes: Size accepts any CSS length.

summary: Configurable loading rows for shared tables.
notes: Column shapes support text, chip, and action cells.

summary: International phone input with searchable country selector and E.164 output.
notes: Defaults to Portugal and prioritizes common BrightWeb markets.

summary: Persistent light, dark, and system theme provider for BrightWeb apps.
notes: Synchronizes class, data-theme, color-scheme, localStorage, and system preference on the html element.

summary: Reads and updates the package-owned BrightWeb theme context.

outputs.description: Selected, resolved, and system themes plus the theme setter.

notes: Returns a safe light-theme fallback when used without ThemeProvider.

summary: Class-variance recipe for shared badge variants and sizes.
notes: Includes the tint variant and small text-ui-micro size.

summary: Application section heading with a themed icon chip, title, subtitle, and action slot.
notes: The icon chip uses the theme section-icon recipe.

summary: Brand-accent pill call-to-action button.
notes: Uses the exported actionClassName recipe.

summary: Reusable class recipe for brand-accent pill actions.
notes: Apply to links or custom controls that match ActionButton.

summary: Compact controlled pagination footer for application tables.
notes: Builds on the shared pagination primitives and uses English ARIA defaults.

summary: Thin article wrapper over the theme surface-card recipe.
notes: Set isLight to apply the theme is-light modifier.

summary: Labeled metric tile using the theme stat-cell recipe.
notes: Compose with StatValue for canonical metric typography.

summary: Canonical metric value typography for StatTile.
notes: Supports normal, large, and display metric sizes.

summary: Domain-neutral tinted status pill with small and normal sizes.
notes: All component-owned colors are resolved through theme tintPill.

summary: Base structural class recipe for StatusPill.
notes: Contains layout and typography only; colors come from tintPill.

summary: Small and normal size recipes for StatusPill.
notes: Uses BrightWeb text-ui typography utilities.

summary: Segmented KPI proportion bar with a token-mapped legend and tooltips.
notes: Consumers provide a domain-neutral tone-to-CSS-variable map.

summary: Centered empty state with icon, title, hint, and optional action.
notes: All user-facing copy is supplied through props.

summary: Avatar fallback that derives up to two initials from neutral label inputs.
notes: Supports active and subtle semantic tones.

summary: Derives up to two uppercase initials from a label and fallback.

outputs.description: One or two initials, or a question mark fallback.

notes: Used by InitialsAvatar.

summary: Domain-neutral role badge driven by a replaceable role-to-token map.
notes: Defaults to the theme role token family and composes StatusPill.

summary: Default mapping from common neutral role buckets to theme role tokens.
notes: Consumers can replace the map without changing RoleBadge.

summary: Converts a role identifier into a readable domain-neutral label.
notes: Callers can bypass it by passing RoleBadge an explicit label.

summary: Resolves a role token from a supplied map with a semantic-neutral fallback.
notes: Used by RoleBadge before applying tintPill.

summary: Registers the admin navigation and toolbar surfaces in the app shell.

notes: Use when wiring the admin starter into app-shell.

summary: Lists admin-managed users with pagination, search, and role filtering.
auth: admin role required in the caller context

inputs.name: params.supabase
inputs.description: Server-side Supabase client with admin access.

inputs.name: params.search
inputs.description: Optional case-insensitive name and email search.

outputs.description: Admin users table data with pagination metadata.

notes: Use when building app-owned admin tables or user management screens.

examples.label: List admin users
examples.code: const users = await listAdminUsers({ supabase, page: 1, pageSize: 10, roleFilter: "staff" });

summary: Package-owned GET handler for the starter admin users endpoint.

inputs.name: request
inputs.description: Incoming request with optional admin user list query parameters.

outputs.description: JSON response containing admin users list data or an error envelope.

notes: Mount from a Next.js route when the package should own the HTTP contract.

query.name: pageSize
query.description: Page size capped at 100. Defaults to 10.

summary: Package-owned POST handler for bulk admin role changes.

inputs.name: request
inputs.description: Incoming request with a bulk role change payload.

notes: Mount from a Next.js route when the package should own the HTTP contract.

body.name: profileIds
body.description: One or more profile ids to update.

body.name: newRole
body.description: Target role for the selected profiles.

body.name: reason
body.description: Audit reason for the role change.

success.description: Changed and skipped results plus summary counters.

errors.description: Validation, authentication, or server error envelope.

summary: Validates and creates a CRM contact.
auth: staff-authenticated Supabase client required; database policy enforces access

summary: Validates and updates mutable CRM contact fields.
auth: staff-authenticated Supabase client required; database policy enforces access
notes: Status changes use setCrmContactStatus so SQL history remains complete.

summary: Changes one CRM contact status through the set_crm_status SQL function.
auth: staff-authenticated Supabase client required; database function enforces access

outputs.description: The contact after the status transition.

notes: The set_crm_status RPC owns crm_status_log writes and unchanged-status no-op behavior.

summary: Changes the status of multiple distinct CRM contacts.
auth: staff-authenticated Supabase client required; database function enforces access
notes: Deduplicates IDs and invokes set_crm_status once per contact.

summary: Deletes one CRM contact and records generic CRM activity.
auth: staff-authenticated Supabase client required; database policy enforces access
notes: Mirrors the delete operation supported by the reference CRM application.

inputs.name: request
inputs.description: JSON request containing CRM contact creation fields.

outputs.description: 201 JSON response with the created contact or an error envelope.

notes: Rejects malformed JSON and non-staff callers before performing writes.

summary: Package-owned PATCH handler for CRM contact and funnel updates.

inputs.description: JSON request containing a contact ID or contact IDs and fields to update.

outputs.description: JSON response with one updated contact or the updated contact IDs.

notes: Supports single-contact field updates and single or bulk status transitions.
